# ADR-003 Bad Filename Pattern

## Status

Accepted, 2026-04-25.

## Context

Synthetic fixture: filename `ADR-3-...` (unpadded number) violates the kebab-case-3-digit pattern.

## Decision

Triggers the Consistency gate.

## Alternatives Considered

- Use canonical filename: rejected for fixture purposes.

## Consequences

Used to verify the filename-pattern check.

## Related Decisions

- None.

## References

- None.
